src: A lamp with a shade decorated with pine tree silhouettes. The base is crafted from faux deer antlers intertwined with natural wood-like elements, sitting on a carved stone-like base.
edit: An eclectic-style lamp featuring a vibrant stained glass shade with abstract patterns. The base is a unique combination of ornate metallic swirls and gemstone accents, creating an intricate and artistic look.

per_image_non_shared_src.clay-banks-uaKbXAjtJAE-unsplash: The lamp sits on a dark wooden nightstand against a backdrop of wooden panel walls. A portion of a bed with a forest-themed comforter is visible to the left, creating a rustic setting.
per_image_non_shared_src.clay-banks-w9wV2Hwz9sI-unsplash: The lamp is on a small, light wooden nightstand beside a bed adorned with patterned bedding. The background features a plain wall with a light switch and part of a large landscape painting.
per_image_non_shared_src.clay-banks-z8VRnFiO-BU-unsplash: The lamp is positioned on a dark wooden cabinet near a large window with arched panes. The walls are made of wooden panels, and a plush chair is partially visible on the right.

per_image_non_shared_edit.clay-banks-uaKbXAjtJAE-unsplash: The lamp sits on a dark wooden nightstand against a backdrop of eclectic apartment walls, with vibrant colors and abstract patterns. A portion of a bed with an eclectic-themed comforter is visible to the left.
per_image_non_shared_edit.clay-banks-w9wV2Hwz9sI-unsplash: The lamp is on a small, light wooden nightstand beside a bed with eclectic-patterned bedding. The background features a wall with colorful abstract artwork and a modern light switch.
per_image_non_shared_edit.clay-banks-z8VRnFiO-BU-unsplash: The lamp is positioned on a dark wooden cabinet near a large window with arched panes. The eclectic apartment walls are adorned with textured panels, and a modern chair is visible on the right.
